scripts.check: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const html=fs.readFileSync('index.html','utf8');const match=html.match(/<script type=\"module\">([\\s\\S]*?)<\\/script>/);if(!match)throw new Error('inline module script not found');fs.writeFileSync('/tmp/local-llm-chat-inline-check.mjs',match[1]);" && node --check /tmp/local-llm-chat-inline-check.mjs
